title: VeloraOS 1.9.0 - Licensing Polish
releaseNotes: Adds clear inactive, expired, revoked, device-limit, device-mismatch, activation-missing, offline-grace and service-error licensing states.
Preserves an existing valid entitlement when a replacement licence attempt fails.
Clears the licence-key field immediately after submission.
Preserves users, chats, settings, avatars, models, licensing files and device identity during update.
Retains SHA-256 verification, Bash syntax checks, atomic deployment and rollback.
